sentiment: The hand that writes slowly remembers what the mind forgets to feel.

stories.title: Flux 3
stories.summary: Black Forest Labs ships Flux 3, a new image generation model that pushes the boundary of what machines can imagine — but imagination without a hand behind it raises the question of what making really means.

stories.title: Writing by hand is good for your brain
stories.summary: Neal Stephenson makes the case for handwriting as cognitive exercise — the slow, physical act of forming letters engages the mind in ways typing never quite reaches.
